start.text: The bundle on your back pulls heavier where the road climbs. A worn stone sits beside the path, smoothed by others who stopped here before you.
start.text_zh: 路一爬高，背上的包袱就坠得更沉。路旁有一块磨损的石头，被一个个曾在此停留的人磨得光滑。

choices.text: Lean on the stone and pray for strength to carry it to the place of deliverance.
choices.text_zh: 靠着石头，祈求力量，好把它一直背到得释放的地方。

choices.text: No time to sit — press on, and try to outwalk the ache.
choices.text_zh: 没工夫坐下——继续走，想把这酸痛甩在身后。

prayed.text: You cannot be rid of it yet — that release waits at a Cross you have not yet seen. But you can carry it faithfully. You rise a little steadier, and the weight feels strangely shared.
prayed.text_zh: 你还不能卸下它——那释放，要等到你尚未见过的一座十字架前。但你能忠心地背着它。你起身时稳了几分，那重担竟仿佛有人同担。

pressed.text: You push past the stone without stopping. The weight stays, and so does the ache — but at least the road behind you grows longer.
pressed.text_zh: 你不停步，越过那石头。重担还在，酸痛也还在——但至少，身后的路在加长。
